response:
# Cheaper Zendesk Alternatives

## Budget-Friendly Options

**Freshdesk** ($15/agent/month)
- Full-featured ticketing system
- AI-powered automation
- Multi-channel support
- Good for small-to-mid teams

**Helpdesk**
- Very affordable entry point
- Basic ticketing and knowledge base
- Minimal learning curve

**Zoho Desk** ($14/agent/month)
- Part of Zoho ecosystem (integrations benefit)
- AI assistant included
- Mobile app
- Good customization

**LiveChat** ($20/month)
- Chat-focused, but expanding
- Ticketing available
- Simple interface
- Real-time collaboration

## Self-Hosted/Open Source

**Osticket**
- Free, open-source
- Lower hosting costs (~$5-10/month)
- Full control
- Requires more technical setup

**Plane**
- Modern, lightweight
- Self-hosted option
- Developer-friendly

## Niche/Specialized

**Groove** ($15/user/month) - Clean, simple UI
**Desk.com** - Salesforce integration (if already using)
**Intercom** - Better for chat/product support focus

## Selection Tips

| Need | Best Pick |
|------|-----------|
| **Tightest budget** | Osticket or Zoho Desk |
| **Ease of use** | Freshdesk or Groove |
| **Chat-first** | LiveChat |
| **Self-hosted** | Osticket or Plane |

What's your primary use case? That would help narrow it down.
